content.query:
CREATE VIEW v_Categories
as
SELECT      DISTINCT TX40+' - @'+ITGR AS Categories
FROM        M3.MITMAS MM 
JOIN        M3.CSYTAB CS ON MM.ITGR = CS.STKY AND CS.STCO = 'ITGR'
;

CREATE VIEW v_SubCategories
AS
SELECT      DISTINCT SC.TX40+' - @'+SC.PDLN AS 'Sub Categories'
FROM        M3.CRPDLN SC
;

CREATE VIEW v_Brands
as
SELECT      DISTINCT TX40+' - @'+ITCL AS Brands
FROM        M3.MITMAS MM 
JOIN        M3.CSYTAB CS ON MM.ITCL = CS.STKY AND CS.STCO = 'ITCL'
;

CREATE VIEW v_Warehouses
as
SELECT      WHNM+' - @'+WHLO as Warehouse
FROM        M3.MITWHL
WHERE       CONO = 100 and DIVI = 'TLC'
;

CREATE VIEW v_Suppliers
as
SELECT      SUNM+' - @'+SUNO AS Supplier
FROM        M3.CIDMAS
